message:
fix(rpc): add MaxMessageSize limit to prevent unbounded memory allocation (bd-3)

Replace bufio.NewReader + ReadBytes('\n') with bufio.Scanner + Buffer()
capped at 10MB in both server and client RPC paths. This prevents a DoS
vector where a client/server sends a line without a newline delimiter,
causing unbounded buffer growth.

Server uses a custom scanCompleteLines split function that only returns
complete newline-terminated lines, preserving correct timeout behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/onyx
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,11 @@ import (
 	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/types"
 )
 
+// MaxMessageSize is the maximum size of a single RPC message (request or response).
+// This prevents unbounded memory allocation from malicious or malformed messages.
+// 10MB is generous for any legitimate beads operation (issue lists, batch ops, etc.).
+const MaxMessageSize = 10 * 1024 * 1024 // 10MB
+
 // Operation constants for all bd commands
 const (
 	OpPing        = "ping"
